description.value:
Bog-iron notes from wetland smithies — Myrmål bog-iron is smelted differently from mountain iron; it swallows impurities the way a marsh swallows a boot, and when the technique is applied to a weapon's temper, it swallows the resistance of mud and water in the same way.

Effect: You ignore difficult terrain caused by knee-deep water, mud, or bog while wielding this weapon.

Rules: Difficult Terrain.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least basic quality; a brick of Myrmål bog-iron and the notes for the swallow-temper process
